# Treat each other well

Everyone participating in the _bashdog_ project, and in particular in the issue tracker,
pull requests, and social media activity, is expected to treat other people with respect
and more generally to follow the guidelines articulated in the
[Python Community Code of Conduct](https://policies.python.org/python.org/code-of-conduct/).

And to quote the great [Black's Code of Conduct](https://github.com/psf/black/blob/main/.github/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)

> Humor is encouraged. We are not savages.
